qa_pairs.question: What is the name of the OpenStack server identified by the ID `1b2a3c21-c1b4-42b8-9016-d96fc8406e04`?
qa_pairs.answer: The OpenStack server with the ID `1b2a3c21-c1b4-42b8-9016-d96fc8406e04` is named `prune-dtn1`.

qa_pairs.question: What is the current operational status of the `prune-dtn1` server?
Which network and associated IP addresses are assigned to the `prune-dtn1` server?
qa_pairs.answer: The `prune-dtn1` server is connected to the `test_network` with IP addresses `172.16.1.86` and `198.168.189.3`.
